emails.subject: Memo
emails.body: Memo Louise, please review and if you require more verbage I can add a lot more than this... I believe this captures the basic scope but if you think otherwise, let me know. BT

emails.subject: RE: Memo
emails.body: RE: Memo Just a quick question 23 years for PGT? To: Kitchen, Louise

emails.subject: RE: Memo
emails.body: For the most part the term of the back to back was 23 years.....with step up volumes. BT To: Tycholiz, Barry
